title: Journey's End Vanilla
description: Client side modpack for the Journey's End vanilla server!
body:
![Journey's End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4603e7d66cdbb7ac24abea3061258d6da334d03e.png) 
**Vanilla Pack**
- This is a small client side pack made for the Journey's End vanilla survival server. With mods like Simple Voice Chat, Figura and Sodium it adds optimizations and quality of life improvements! Make sure you're whitelisted before joining the server! Also feel free to add on your own client side mods!



**Note: This is NOT for the modded server!**
